7508810.title: Michel Marcel Navratil

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: French philosopher and professor, Titanic survivor (1908–2001)

7508810.description: French philosopher and professor, Titanic survivor (1908–2001)
7508810.extract: Michel Marcel Navratil Jr. (12 June 1908 – 30 January 2001) was a French philosophy professor who was one of the last survivors of the sinking of Titanic on 15 April 1912. He, along with his brother, Edmond (1910–1953), were known as the "Titanic Orphans", having been the only children rescued without a parent or guardian. He was three years old at the time of the disaster.
